summary: Define service-level `typing.Protocol`s in `schemas/` (not a new `protocols/` folder) — this is the established contract home for the domain. Export a module-level singleton typed as the Protocol from the concrete service file (`quality_gate_service: QualityGateServiceProtocol = QualityGateService()`); consumers import and call the singleton rather than the class so adding new implementations never requires editing consumers.
